lastReleaseMessage: Resolve leftovers: feedback honeypot (spam guard), contrast/name-overflow fixes, cat-switcher + account-menu Esc-close and aria-expanded, tabs arrow-key nav, target-ring aria labels, sort default persists, form-modal honeypot support

milestone.label: v0.16 - Supabase auth + Stripe subscriptions + live TICA data pipeline

items: Favorability recommender SHIPPED FOR REAL (v0.17.13, 2026-07-03): the 2026-06-30 'TICA publishes no pre-show panels' finding was WRONG â€” panels ARE published behind shows.tica.org's view-details AJAX (?option=com_toes&view=show&layout=short&id=<id>&tmpl=component, GET + browser UA, no cookies). Daily cron scrapes panels (30/run, US-first, 7d re-check) into cal:tica; calendar cards show tappable judge pills (rate per cat via reason-modal rules), rank favored-panel shows first, then home region, then soonest. Remaining polish: intl coverage grows as cron converges; re-check cadence for clubs that post panels late
Breed line-art generation/harvest (icon system wired; 5 of ~60 breeds live) â€” BLOCKED on a one-time Chrome download grant for midjourney.com (Kane's click)

Multi-user cat sharing SHIPPED + verified working (2026-06-30): owner adds an agent by email; agent gets FULL access (own overlay in their blob), grouped 'Cats I'm an agent for'; leak-critical single-cat extraction unit-tested; super-admin view-as loads the viewed user's agent cats. Remaining: MERGED co-ownership (shared writes both see), email invite notification, reg-number join requests + certificate verification
Auth polish: magic-link / verification edge cases

Security (docs/SECURITY.md): sprint 2026-06-30..07-02 (v0.17.2-0.17.10). DONE: CSP+headers (run_worker_first), rate limits, audit log, prototype-pollution guard, shared-cat payload sanitization, seed-share owner-check, DB advisor lockdown (migration 0006), judge-rating anti-ballot-stuffing, supabase-js confirmed latest, leaked webhook revoked, rotation runbook. **P1-7 DONE + verified live: per-user state migrated to Postgres user_state with RLS (migration 0007); dual-write KV+PG, STATE_READ=pg flag + KV fallback/lazy-backfill; RLS isolation proven (own-row-only/anon-denied); view-as+sharing stay on KV; cost-neutral (free tier) + cron keep-warm.** **Turnstile widget CREATED + site key wired + deployed (v0.17.12, 2026-07-02): managed-mode widget for ring.yesandeverything.com, TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY var live, /api/config serves it, CSP opens challenges.cloudflare.com, login renders widget + passes captchaToken; verified turnstile.render() accepts the key on the live hostname.** **Turnstile ENFORCING (2026-07-03): Kane pasted the secret into Supabase CAPTCHA; verified live â€” OTP without captcha_token now returns captcha_failed.** OPEN: full relational cats/shows normalization (optional product-scale), move view-as/sharing reads to DEFINER RPCs. KANE ACTION: recreate Ring Resources Bot webhook (release digests currently fail with 'Invalid URI' from the placeholder file)

barRaise.topFinding: Ring is a live, actively-developed PWA in strong shape (health 79) with nothing broken today; the sharpest findings are all operational resilience for a now-real product: the Worker swallows errors in many bare catch blocks so a broken cron or a dead upstream is invisible, community judge ratings live in KV with no backup, the dual-write KV+Postgres state path has no atomicity, and the daily scrape plus per-keystroke TICA fan-out will pressure the free-tier Worker budget as usage grows. None is a live outage; together they are the right pre-1.0 hardening list now that breeders depend on the tool.

actions.title: Instrument the Worker: structured logging on error paths, cron status in /api/health, persistent log sink.
Back up the KV-only community judge ratings to a Postgres mirror or daily snapshot.
Budget the Worker for free-tier limits: adaptive cron, longer search caches, batched season sweeps.
Make the dual-write KV+Postgres state path atomic and self-repairing; log backfill failures.
Add authenticated user-data export + delete (GDPR) endpoints and a retention policy.
Document the getJudges() XSS backstop inline before it is removed by accident.
Cache/JWKS-verify Supabase tokens to cut the per-request verifyUser round-trip.
Fictionalize or document-as-consented the real names + email in public/data/seed.json.
Strip the 30 em dashes from README/PROJECT_SPEC/CHANGELOG/DEPLOY and UI strings.
Add package.json to check-version-pill.ps1 and check discord-notify.ps1 exit code in release.ps1.
Section public/app.js into documented layers; add phase comments to applyCatPull/parseReport.
Version- and SRI-pin the vendored supabase.js and document its source version.
Add timestamp-aware conflict handling to the multi-device state merge.
Move view-as/sharing cross-user reads to SECURITY DEFINER RPCs.
Fail the rate limiter closed (or log) when KV is unavailable.
Harden judge-vote dedupe against multi-account ballot stuffing.

deferred.title: Decide a v1.0 freeze vs a scoped Phase-2 milestone (ownership, invites, cert verification).
Revisit pricing/unit-economics; $1/mo needs ~500 users to cover hosting.
Reframe the phase-2 auth paragraph in PROJECT_SPEC.md + CLAUDE.md so auth/RLS read as live.
deferred.reason: already tracked as pending queue item canonical-audit-2026-07-03-ring-phase2-auth-live-reframe
